data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Loews Hotels & Co/
data.description: Loews Hotel & Co has announced the launch of its new program, "Alchemy by Loews Hotels," on March 25, 2026. The program aims to enhance the guest experience by introducing unique offerings and services. This initiative is intended to elevate the hospitality standards set by Loews Hotel & Co and reinforce their commitment to customer satisfaction. The company seeks to provide guests with tailored experiences, personalized services, and exclusive amenities. More information about this program can be found in the complete release issued by Loews Hotels & Co.

data.title: CrowdStrike Launches the Charlotte AI AgentWorks Ecosystem for Building Secure Agents
data.description: At the RSA 2026 event, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) unveiled the Charlotte AI AgentWorks Ecosystem in partnership with Accenture, Amazon Web Services (AWS), Anthropic, Deloitte, Kroll, NVIDIA, OpenAI, Salesforce, and Telefónica Tech. This initiative allows customers to use CrowdStrike’s no-code development platform and advanced AI models to create, manage, and expand personalized security agents securely. This ecosystem presents new opportunities for innovation and collaboration within the industry.

data.title: TruGrid Earns Perfect Record Award for Safety Accomplishments
data.description: In Houston on March 25, 2026, TruGrid received the prestigious Perfect Record Award from the National Safety Council for accomplishing a remarkable 12 consecutive months without any work-related injuries or illnesses that led to missed work days. This achievement was from January 1 through December of the previous year.

data.title: Pet Supplies Plus Opens Fond du Lac Location, Delivering Convenient Neighborhood Pet Care
data.description: The grand opening of a new Pet Supplies Plus store in Fond du Lac, Wisconsin will take place on March 28-29, 2026. The store, situated at 477 W. Johnson St., promises the best prices, selection, and service guaranteed. Customers can look forward to a wide range of pet supplies and products at competitive prices.

data.title: Statement by Ecopetrol's Board of Directors
data.description: Ecopetrol S.A., a leading oil and gas company in Colombia listed on the BVC (ECOPETROL) and NYSE (EC), recently held a Board of Directors meeting on March 24, 2026, in Bogota, Colombia. During the meeting, various topics were discussed, including a communication received from the UNIÓN SINDICAL. The company's stocks are actively traded on both the Colombian and New York Stock Exchanges, affirming its strong market presence. The meeting highlighted key decisions and deliberations regarding the company's operations and future prospects.

data.title: Banyan Treatment Centers and HoloMD Report 90-Day Pilot Results Demonstrating AI-Supported Early Intervention and Continuity of Care in Post-Discharge Recovery
data.description: In Pompano Beach, Florida, and Rockville, Maryland, Banyan Treatment Centers and HoloMD have joined forces to introduce the Banyan Companion™ at Banyan Treatment Centers Texas. This pilot program lasted 90 days, assessing HoloMD's between-visit monitoring model within a high-acuity recovery population post discharge. Banyan Treatment Centers, a leading national provider of substance use disorder and co-occurring mental health treatment services, collaborated with HoloMD, a platform that facilitates Continuous Precision Psychiatry through Human+AI monitoring and reporting. The pilot program's results were recently revealed, showcasing the effectiveness of this innovative approach.

data.title: EisnerAmper Announces Continuation Vehicle Transaction with TowerBrook
data.description: The recent agreement signifies the strong growth prospects of EisnerAmper, a financial advisory group based in New York. On March 25, 2026, Eisner Advisory Group LLC, commonly known as EisnerAmper, finalized a continuation vehicle transaction (CV) with TowerBrook Capital Partners L.P. Leading this transaction was Carlyle AlpInvest. This deal highlights the long-term potential of EisnerAmper and sets the stage for further expansion.

data.title: Richmond American Community to Host Open House in Palmetto
data.description: A variety of new homes with spacious floor plans are being featured in Maple Ridge. Richmond American Homes of Florida, LP, a subdivision of Sekisui House U.S., Inc., proudly presents this development. The announcement was made on March 25, 2026, in Palmetto, Florida. More information can be found on the website RichmondAmerican.com/MapleRidge.

data.title: GLG Opens Office in San Francisco
data.description: GLG, a renowned platform for trusted human expertise, has recently inaugurated an office in San Francisco's Financial District as part of its strategic move to enhance engagement with clients in the technology, consulting, and finance sectors. This expansion marks a notable step for GLG, aimed at fostering closer connections with its clientele. The new office location in the bustling Financial District is strategically positioned to cater to the company's growing customer base in the region. With this move, GLG is poised to further solidify its presence in the market and facilitate seamless access to its services for a wide range of industries. The decision to establish a hub in such a pivotal area underscores GLG's commitment to providing unparalleled expertise and solutions to its clients.

data.title: Stratus Medical Recognized on Fortune's America's Most Innovative Companies List for 2026
data.description: A Texas-based company, Stratus® Medical, specializing in advancing radiofrequency ablation (RFA) treatment for chronic pain, has recently been honored by Fortune as one of America's Most Innovative Companies for the year 2026. This prestigious recognition is a testament to Stratus® Medical's commitment to transforming chronic pain management through innovative RFA techniques. This accolade, powered by Fortune, highlights the company's dedication to revolutionizing the healthcare industry.
